stemHtml: During a distress or emergency, why must the controlling ATC station notify other ATC units involved?

options.a: To comply with international regulations on emergency information sharing.
options.b: To prepare the other unit for potential airspace and traffic pattern changes.
options.c: To help the other unit coordinate with nearby aircraft for assistance.
options.d: To prevent the other unit from inadvertently transferring more traffic to the affected frequency.
